zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体呈窄幅震荡整理格局，价格围绕6.78一线运行，短线缺乏明确方向，但仍略偏多头结构，未跌破关键均线支撑。  

技术指标显示MACD维持轻微正值，动能偏弱但未转空，价格运行在20日均线上方，整体趋势仍受短期多头支撑，但需关注量能变化。  

支撑位关注6.7776日内低点及6.72附近SMA20，若失守可能回测6.70区域；上方阻力位于6.81及6.85一线。  

操作上建议以区间低吸高抛为主，突破6.81可轻仓顺势跟进，若跌破6.72则需谨慎控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a tight consolidation phase with price action hovering near 6.78 after a very modest 24-hour decline of -0.07%. The range between 6.7776 and 6.8142 highlights compressed volatility, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the lack of strong directional momentum, the structure remains slightly constructive as price holds above recent intraday lows and continues to trade above short-term baseline levels.

From an indicator perspective, the SMA(20) at 6.72083 is acting as a dynamic support zone, with price maintaining a comfortable buffer above it. The MACD reading at 0.02627 indicates a mild bullish bias, though the absence of a visible signal line reading limits confirmation strength. With RSI(14) unavailable, momentum assessment leans on price behavior, which currently reflects neutrality with a slight upward tilt rather than any overbought or oversold condition.

Key support is located first at the intraday low of 6.7776, followed by a stronger structural base around the SMA(20) near 6.72. A deeper breakdown could expose 6.65 as the next demand zone. On the upside, immediate resistance is seen at 6.8142, with a more meaningful barrier near 6.85. A sustained break above this region would open the path toward the psychological 7.00 level.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy unless a breakout occurs. Buying dips toward 6.72–6.75 offers a favorable risk-reward setup with protective stops below 6.65. Profit-taking can be considered near 6.81–6.85 in a consolidation scenario. Alternatively, a decisive close above 6.85 would shift bias toward continuation, targeting incremental moves toward 7.00 and beyond with momentum confirmation.
